message:
fix(formulas): add explicit version attributes to ru and ubs

Both formulas use version.to_s in their tests but were missing
explicit version attributes, relying on Homebrew's URL version
inference. Add explicit versions for reliability:
- ru.rb: version "1.2.1" with v#{version} in URL
- ubs.rb: version "5.0.6" with v#{version} in URL

This ensures tests work correctly regardless of version detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@
 class Ru < Formula
   desc "Robust CLI tool for synchronizing GitHub repositories"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater"
-  url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater/releases/download/v1.2.1/ru"
+  version "1.2.1"
+  url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater/releases/download/v#{version}/ru"
   sha256 "7dc465cc5a47102b68a983202b1026d451d767d76c969fe03c6eac1726bf3709"
   license "MIT"

@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@
 class Ubs < Formula
   desc "Comprehensive code analysis tool for finding bugs and security issues"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner"
-  url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/v5.0.6/ubs"
+  version "5.0.6"
+  url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/v#{version}/ubs"
   sha256 "ebb31bf412a409a19a060f2587c2ea02f185c0bf695204db6c73ef7560d377ed"
   license "MIT"
